## Source Information

- **Name**:
- **Website**:
- **Documentation** (if any):

## API Availability

- **Official API exists?** [ ] Yes [ ] No [ ] Partial
  - If yes, link to docs:
- **Requires authentication?** [ ] Yes [ ] No
  - If yes, what kind? (OAuth, API key, etc.)
- **Rate limits?** (if known)

## Legal Considerations

- **Does the source's ToS allow third-party apps?** [ ] Yes [ ] No [ ] Unknown
  - Link to relevant ToS section:
- **Does it require DRM circumvention?** [ ] Yes [ ] No
  - (If yes, we cannot accept this proposal.)
- **Is there a precedent?** (Has anyone built a similar integration?)

## Technical Considerations

- **Audio format**: (e.g., MP3, FLAC, HLS)
- **Streaming method**: (e.g., direct URLs, manifest files, SDK)
- **Metadata available**: (e.g., title, artist, album, artwork, ISRC)
- **Library access**: (e.g., user playlists, liked tracks, history)
- **Estimated complexity**: (Low / Medium / High)

## Implementation

- **Are you willing to implement this?** [ ] Yes [ ] No
- **If yes, do you have experience with the source's API?** [ ] Yes [ ] No
- **Estimated time to implement**:

## Alternatives

Are there alternative sources that provide similar functionality and might be easier to integrate?

Anything else we should know?
